enriched_points.expanded_content: Autonomous vehicles utilize various sensors like Lidar, radar, and cameras to perceive their environment, enhancing navigation and safety for all road users.

enriched_points.point_title: Role of AI in Decision Making
enriched_points.expanded_content: AI algorithms process sensor data, enabling AVs to make real-time decisions in complex environments, significantly improving navigation and operational efficiency.
Vehicle-to-everything (V2X) communication allows AVs to interact with other vehicles and infrastructure, improving situational awareness and enhancing safety measures for vulnerable road users.
Technological advancements in AVs, such as advanced sensors and AI, bolster safety protocols, reducing accidents and fatalities on the road.
